overview: Save editable GIMP workfiles and preserve layered project state before handing off to export when needed.
when_to_use: Use when the task explicitly asks to save the project, keep layers, or write an XCF workfile.
Use when overwrite confirmation or project-save routing matters more than raster export options.
preconditions: The current edit is ready to save.
The destination name or folder is known.

atomic_capabilities.name: Open Save Image Surface
atomic_capabilities.purpose: Reach the save surface that preserves an editable GIMP workfile.

atomic_capabilities.name: Confirm Workfile Name And Save
atomic_capabilities.purpose: Set the workfile name and confirm the save while preserving editable state.

decision_guide.condition: The task requires preserving layers or saving as XCF.
decision_guide.reason: Editable workfiles belong to the save family, not the raster export family.

when_to_use: Use when the task explicitly asks to save the project, keep layers, or write an XCF workfile.
Use when overwrite confirmation or project-save routing matters more than raster export options.

states.visual_grounding: The Save Image dialog is open rather than the generic export flow.
states.trigger_condition: The task is to preserve the editable project state.
states.action: Verify that the workflow is in the save surface, not the export surface.
states.text_description: Use the save surface when the task needs editable project preservation.

states.visual_grounding: The workfile name field is set in the save dialog.
states.trigger_condition: The save surface is already open.
states.action: Set the requested workfile name and confirm the save.
states.text_description: The save flow is ready to finish once the requested workfile name is visible.

common_failure_modes: Using an export-only workflow when the task requires preserving editable state.
Treating a format-options dialog as proof that the XCF save already succeeded.
